THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAWSON, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1310 TURL #608, S.F., STAYED UNTIL NOV-22-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE BY NOV 22, 1993 5PM, DEFT TO PAY PLTF $1,876.80. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LAWSON, JAMES
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LAWSON, JAMES
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LAWSON, JAMES

DEPT. 5, JUDGE WICK, CSR BRENDA FIELDS, CLERK E.MONTI 3:09 PM C/C FOR SETTL CONF. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, ADAM BARASCH. DEFT WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER. BOTH PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR PLTF: PLTF IS AWARDED IMMEDIATE RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 1310 TURK STREET #608 AND FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT. WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT STAYED TO 11-22-93, 5PM. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE BY 11-22-93, 5PM, THEN JUDGMENT SHALL ENTER IN THE AMOUNT OF $1876.80. IF DEFT VACATES, THEN PLTF WILL WAIVE BACK RENT & DAMAGES. DEFT. IS SOLE OCCUPANT. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES. PLTF. TO PREPARE STIPULATION.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
